name: Smart Lead Generation and Automated Follow-Up System

parameters.content:
📊 Smart Lead Generation & Follow-Up System
1. Visual Workflow Diagram
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                         LEAD INPUT SOURCES                               │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                                    │
        ┌───────────────────────────┼───────────────────────────┐
        │                           │                           │
        ▼                           ▼                           ▼
┌───────────────┐          ┌───────────────┐          ┌───────────────┐
│  Form Lead    │          │  Social DM    │          │ Scraped List  │
│   Capture     │          │   Webhook     │          │   Webhook     │
│  (n8n Form)   │          │   (POST)      │          │   (POST)      │
└───────┬───────┘          └───────┬───────┘          └───────┬───────┘
        │                           │                           │
        └───────────────────────────┼───────────────────────────┘
                                    │
                                    ▼
                        ┌───────────────────────┐
                        │  Merge All Lead       │
                        │  Sources (3 inputs)   │
                        └───────────┬───────────┘
                                    │
                                    ▼
                        ┌───────────────────────┐
                        │  Workflow             │
                        │  Configuration        │
                        │  (Set Variables)      │
                        └───────────┬───────────┘
                                    │
                                    ▼
                        ┌───────────────────────┐
                        │  Normalize Lead Data  │
                        │  (Standardize Fields) │
                        └───────────┬───────────┘
                                    │
                                    ▼
                        ┌───────────────────────┐
                        │  Store Lead in        │
                        │  Database (Sheets)    │
                        └───────────┬───────────┘
                                    │
                                    ▼
                        ┌───────────────────────┐
                        │  Generate             │
                        │  Personalized Message │
                        │  (OpenAI GPT)         │
                        └───────────┬───────────┘
                                    │
                                    ▼
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                    CHANNEL ROUTING (BRANCHING)                           │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                                    │
                        ┌───────────────────────┐
                        │  Route by Channel     │
                        │  Preference (Switch)  │
                        └───────┬───────┬───────┘
                                │       │
                    ┌───────────┘       └───────────┐
                    │                               │
                    ▼                               ▼
        ┌───────────────────┐         ┌───────────────────┐
        │  Send Email       │         │  Send Slack       │
        │  Outreach (Gmail) │         │  Message          │
        └─────────┬─────────┘         └─────────┬─────────┘
                  │                             │
                  └──────────────┬──────────────┘
                                 │
                                 ▼
                    ┌───────────────────────┐
                    │  Log Outreach         │
                    │  Activity (Code)      │
                    └───────────────────────┘
2. Required Nodes
Trigger Nodes (Lead Sources)
Form Lead Capture - n8n-nodes-base.formTrigger
Social DM Webhook - n8n-nodes-base.webhook
Scraped List Webhook - n8n-nodes-base.webhook
Data Processing Nodes
Merge All Lead Sources - n8n-nodes-base.merge
Workflow Configuration - n8n-nodes-base.set
Normalize Lead Data - n8n-nodes-base.set
Storage Node
Store Lead in Database - n8n-nodes-base.googleSheets
AI Content Generation
Generate Personalized Message - @n8n/n8n-nodes-langchain.openAi
Routing & Output Nodes
Route by Channel Preference - n8n-nodes-base.switch
Send Email Outreach - n8n-nodes-base.gmail
Send Slack Message - n8n-nodes-base.slack
Logging Node
Log Outreach Activity - n8n-nodes-base.code
3. Step-by-Step Building Guide
Phase 1: Set Up Lead Input Sources
Step 1: Configure Form Lead Capture

Node already configured with fields: Full Name, Email, Company, Preferred Contact Method, Message
Form URL: Available in the node after activation
Use this for website lead capture forms
Step 2: Configure Social DM Webhook

Webhook URL: https://kennylegit.app.n8n.cloud/webhook/social-dm-lead
Method: POST
Use this to receive leads from social media automation tools (Zapier, Make, etc.)
Step 3: Configure Scraped List Webhook

Webhook URL: https://kennylegit.app.n8n.cloud/webhook/scraped-list-lead
Method: POST
Use this to import bulk leads from scraping tools
Phase 2: Merge & Configure
Step 4: Merge All Lead Sources

Combines all three input sources into one stream
Mode: Combine All Items
Handles leads from any source simultaneously
Step 5: Workflow Configuration

Centralizes workflow settings
Configure these placeholders:
slackDefaultChannel: Your Slack channel ID
companyName: Your company name for personalization
Phase 3: Normalize & Store
Step 6: Normalize Lead Data

Standardizes field names from different sources
Maps variations like fullName, name, lead_name → leadName
Ensures consistent data structure for downstream nodes
Step 7: Store Lead in Database

Configure Google Sheets connection
Set your Google Sheet ID and Sheet Name
Auto-maps normalized fields to columns
Creates permanent record of all leads
Phase 4: AI Message Generation
Step 8: Generate Personalized Message

Uses OpenAI GPT-4o-mini
References lead source, name, company, and message
Creates tailored outreach under 150 words
System prompt ensures professional, friendly tone with clear CTA
Phase 5: Channel Routing (Branching)
Step 9: Route by Channel Preference

Branching Logic:
If preferredChannel = "email" → Route to Email Outreach
If preferredChannel = "slack" → Route to Slack Message
Fallback: Defaults to email if no preference specified
Step 10: Send Email Outreach

Sends via Gmail
Uses AI-generated message
Subject from Workflow Configuration
Recipient from normalized lead email
Step 11: Send Slack Message

Posts to configured Slack channel
Includes lead name, company, and AI message
Alternative to email for internal team notifications
Phase 6: Activity Logging
Step 12: Log Outreach Activity

Records which channel was used
Timestamps the outreach
Tracks success status
Can be extended to write back to Google Sheets for reporting
⚙️ How to Setup
Google Sheets Configuration:

Create a Google Sheet for lead storage
Copy the Sheet ID from the URL
Configure "Store Lead in Database" node with Sheet ID and Sheet Name
Slack Channel Setup:

Get your Slack Channel ID (right-click channel → View channel details)
Update "Workflow Configuration" node's slackDefaultChannel field
Company Name:

Update "Workflow Configuration" node's companyName field with your company name
Webhook Integration:

Copy webhook URLs from "Social DM Webhook" and "Scraped List Webhook" nodes
Configure your external tools (Zapier, Make, scraping tools) to POST to these URLs
Expected JSON format:
{
  "name": "John Doe",
  "email": "john@example.com",
  "company": "Acme Corp",
  "source": "linkedin",
  "preferred_channel": "email",
  "message": "Interested in your product"
}
Form URL:

Activate the workflow
Copy the form URL from "Form Lead Capture" node
Embed on your website or share directly
Let me know if you'd like to adjust anything.

⚙️ How to Setup
Google Sheets Configuration:

Create a Google Sheet for lead storage
Copy the Sheet ID from the URL
Update "Store Lead in Database" node with your Sheet ID and Sheet Name
Slack Channel Setup:

Get your Slack Channel ID (right-click channel → View channel details)
Update "Workflow Configuration" node's slackDefaultChannel field
Company Name:

Update "Workflow Configuration" node's companyName field with your company name
Webhook URLs for External Tools:

Social DM Webhook: https://kennylegit.app.n8n.cloud/webhook/social-dm-lead
Scraped List Webhook: https://kennylegit.app.n8n.cloud/webhook/scraped-list-lead
Configure your external tools to POST leads to these URLs
Form URL:

Activate the workflow to get your form URL from "Form Lead Capture" node
Share this URL or embed it on your website
Let me know if you'd like to adjust anything.

The Log Outreach Activity Code node will output a JSON object with the following structure:

{
  "leadName": "John Doe",
  "channel": "email",
  "timestamp": "2024-01-15T14:30:45.123Z",
  "status": "sent",
  "message": "Outreach completed successfully"
}
Field Breakdown:
leadName: The name of the lead from the normalized data (e.g., "John Doe", "Jane Smith")

channel: The communication channel used for outreach

"email" - if sent via Gmail
"slack" - if sent via Slack
timestamp: ISO 8601 formatted timestamp of when the log was created (e.g., "2024-01-15T14:30:45.123Z")

status: Always returns "sent" to indicate successful outreach

message: Always returns "Outreach completed successfully"

Example Outputs:
For Email Outreach:

{
  "leadName": "Sarah Johnson",
  "channel": "email",
  "timestamp": "2024-01-15T10:25:30.456Z",
  "status": "sent",
  "message": "Outreach completed successfully"
}
For Slack Outreach:

{
  "leadName": "Michael Chen",
  "channel": "slack",
  "timestamp": "2024-01-15T11:42:18.789Z",
  "status": "sent",
  "message": "Outreach completed successfully"
}
Use Cases for This Output:
You could extend this node to:

Write the log back to Google Sheets for tracking
Send to a monitoring service
Trigger follow-up workflows based on the channel used
Create analytics dashboards
Set up alerts for failed outreach attempts
